publicV1.reason: Only scripts/public-surface-*.mjs test tooling changes; no /v1 operation, schema, status code, or error body is touched and no product code path changes.

mcp.reason: No MCP tool, argument, result, registration, or transport behavior changes; the change hardens local test tooling only.

openapi.reason: The OpenAPI projection and its generator are untouched; no operation or schema changes exist to project.

apiPlayground.reason: The Playground catalog and rendering are untouched; the change is confined to repository test scripts.

internalOnly.reason: Sanitizes hook-exported GIT_* environment variables out of every git subprocess the public-surface fixture and workflow-invariant tests spawn, so pre-commit/pre-push runs can no longer commit fixture state onto the real repository branch or replace the real index.
